name: Picture Card Pack 3 Black Cards Lis
blackCards: 10-23, this is Officer Monroe requesting immediate backup. We’ve got a situation involving ______.
HELLO WELCOME TO BUSINESS ARE YOU LOOKING FOR ______?
How are we feeling today, Mrs. Rosenberg? Are we still having trouble with ______?
Introducing Marvel’s newest hero, Thunt the Scoundrel! His superpower is ______.
Timmy plays the drums so he doesn’t have to think about ______.
What’s the name of their band?
You’re probably wondering, how did I get here? Well, let me tell you a little story about ______.
whiteCards: An all-night fuck sesh with your dad’s client Robert.
Finding out that my dad is my brother and my mom is my father and my sister is my mother and also I’m their dog.
Giving everyone at the nursing home chlamydia.
Going to shake a guy’s hand, noticing that his hand is a fish, and pretending not to notice that his hand is a fish.
Leaping Joosep, the Estonian version of Spider-Man.
Some white lady dying, who cares.
The dick vein on the Snickers bar.
The lizard that bit off Jimmy Carter’s penis.
What I’m about to do to this stuffed crab.
